context: This scenario checks that the agent can use Calibre metadata to locate the correct book record and resolve a real file path, instead of inventing or guessing from directory names.

checklist.name: correct book identified
checklist.description: Reports the exact title 'The Problems of Philosophy', author 'Bertrand Russell', and book_id 4 from the library.

checklist.name: metadata-first discovery
checklist.description: Uses library metadata lookup to find the book before resolving the file path, rather than guessing from folder structure.

checklist.name: real epub path resolved
checklist.description: Returns a real resolved EPUB path from the Calibre library, or honestly reports available formats if EPUB is unavailable.

checklist.name: method explanation
checklist.description: Briefly explains the lookup sequence used (metadata lookup then path resolution) and stays consistent with the returned evidence.
